templates.name: When will I receive my Refund?
templates.content:
Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item. We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.
If you are approved, then your refund will be processed, and a credit will automatically be applied to your credit card or original method of payment, within a certain amount of days.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Would you mind sharing your usual size? Happy to help you find the right size! If you're not quite sure which size is right for you, I'd also recommend taking a look at our Size Chart located on each product page. They're located underneath the available sizes for each of our products.

templates.name: How do I start a return/exchange?
templates.content: You can start your return at the following link: https://exchanges.section119.com/#/

templates.name: Rewards program
templates.content: We have a great rewards program! Become a Section 119 member, and start earning rewards! No obscure points system, you just get rewarded with credit rewards directly to your account. The more you spend - the more perks you will receive on your way to becoming an Exclusive Member! You can join here https://section119.com/pages/rewards-program-page?_pos=1&_sid=abd64a7ca&_ss=r

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We completely get it, we change our minds too! While we wish could, once an order is placed, we are unable to alter or cancel it at this time. We hope to have a cancellation window one day in the future. Should the item(s) not work out, make sure to exchange for a preferred style or return for a refund. As a reminder, domestic return shipping is free.

templates.name: Which carriers do you offer?
templates.content: We usually ship via USPS, DHL, or UPS Ground. You should be able to see all of our shipping options at checkout

templates.name: International shipping
templates.content: We currently only ship throughout the US and Canada, but we hope to expand internationally soon.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: We're here to help! Our times are Monday-Friday from 10am-6pm EST, but we're closed on major holidays and most Friday and Monday tour days, like Wrigley, AC, Alpine Valley, Fenway, Deer Creek, and more. Need to reach us? Please use the contact form on our website here https://section119.com/pages/contact Our team would love to support you!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/sec.119/ FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Section.119/ and on Pinterest here: https://www.pinterest.com/section119_/

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day and we usually ship via USPS, DHL, or UPS Ground. Once shipped it will take 7-10 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://section119.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at info@section119.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at info@section119.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: 20BACK / 20% Cashback
templates.content: Please note that the offer is not for a discount but cashback. You can redeem the award after purchase, from the confirmation email. I hope this clarifies!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Does Store credits/points expire?
templates.content: Store credits issued by Section 119 do not expire. This means you can choose to use your store credit at any time that's convenient for you without worrying about a deadline. It's our way of ensuring you have the flexibility to select the perfect item at your leisure.
